books.title: The Secret City
books.author: Hugh Walpole
books.summary: A Russian family and their English friends become tangled in threads of intrigue as the Revolution erupts around them.

books.title: Lord Tony’s Wife
books.author: Baroness Orczy
books.summary: A young woman and her father are kidnapped by a man intent on revenge for his father’s death.

books.title: A Yankee in the Trenches
books.author: Robert Derby Holmes
books.summary: An American describes his experiences in the British Army in the First World War.

books.title: A General History of the Pirates
books.author: Captain Charles Johnson
books.summary: The lives and stories of the daring pirate outlaws who terrorized the Atlantic Ocean and Caribbean Sea in the 18th century.

books.title: The Princess and Curdie
books.author: George MacDonald
books.summary: A young miner accepts a mysterious commission that will test his faithfulness and restore justice to a faltering kingdom.

books.title: Three Men in a Boat
books.author: Jerome K. Jerome
books.summary: The humorous travelogue of a boating holiday down the Thames taken by three friends and their dog.

books.title: An Ideal Husband
books.author: Oscar Wilde
books.summary: Over the course of twenty-four hours, a blackmail plot threatens to bring down a member of the British aristocracy.

books.title: Short Fiction
books.author: R. A. Lafferty
books.summary: A collection of science fiction and fantasy stories by R. A. Lafferty ordered by date of publication.

books.title: Moll Flanders
books.author: Daniel Defoe
books.summary: A resourceful woman navigates 18th-century English society and colonial America over a lifetime of seventy years, using her wit and resilience in her quest for wealth and happiness.

books.title: The House on the Borderland
books.author: William Hope Hodgson
books.summary: An account of the terrifying metaphysical haunting of a recluse’s secluded home.

books.title: My Disillusionment in Russia
books.author: Emma Goldman
books.summary: Emma Goldman recounts her experiences living in the early Soviet Union.

books.title: Trent’s Last Case
books.author: E. C. Bentley
books.summary: A journalist investigates the murder of a Wall Street kingpin.

books.title: History of the Peloponnesian War
books.author: Thucydides
books.summary: A contemporary history of the ancient Greek war between Athens and Sparta and their allies.

books.title: The End of the World
books.author: Geoffrey Dennis
books.summary: A philosophical reflection on how the end of the world would unfold based on hypothetical variables and relevant knowledge and historical context.

books.title: Poetry
books.author: Ameen Rihani
books.summary: A collection of Ameen Rihani’s poetry.

books.title: Sunshine Sketches of a Little Town
books.author: Stephen Leacock
books.summary: A humorous account of life in the fictional small town of Mariposa.

books.title: Search the Sky
books.author: Frederik Pohl
books.summary: A man visits several worlds as he attempts to discover why humanity is dying out.

books.title: Allan Quatermain Stories
books.author: H. Rider Haggard
books.summary: A collection of short stories about a legendary hunter.

books.title: The Kingdom of God Is Within You
books.author: Leo Tolstoy
books.summary: Tolstoy describes true Christianity as a non-hierarchical, nonviolent, non-coercive pursuit, and criticizes institutional Christianity as a deceptive corruption.

books.title: On a Chinese Screen
books.author: W. Somerset Maugham
books.summary: A collection of short vignettes about the people and places W. Somerset Maugham encountered during his travels along the Yangtze River in 1919–20.
